session.user:
Run these commands and report results. Do NOT modify any files.
1. `ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py tests/commands/pr/test_dispatch.py` 2. `ty check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py tests/commands/pr/test_dispatch.py`
Report the output verbatim.
session.assistant: I'll run both commands and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py tests/commands/pr/test_dispatch.py
Check ruff linting on dispatch command and test files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ty check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py tests/commands/pr/test_dispatch.py
Check type annotations on dispatch command and test files

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 E501 Line too long (116 > 100) --> tests/commands/pr/test_dispatch.py:532:101 | 531 | # Verify: dispatch succeeded 532 | assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Expected success, got exit code {result.exit_code}\nOutput: {result.output}" | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ 533 | assert "Traceback" not in result.output |
Found 1 error.

session.assistant:
## Results
**ruff check**: FAILED - 1 error found
``` E501 Line too long (116 > 100) --> tests/commands/pr/test_dispatch.py:532:101 ```
Line 532 exceeds the 100-character limit by 16 characters.
---
**ty check**: FAILED - 3 diagnostics found
``` error[invalid-argument-type]: Argument to function `build_plan_stage_body` is incorrect --> tests/commands/pr/test_dispatch.py:50:13 | 50 | summary=None, | ^^^^^^^^^^^^ Expected `str`, found `None`
error[invalid-argument-type]: Argument to function `build_plan_stage_body` is incorrect --> tests/commands/pr/test_dispatch.py:159:9 | 159 | summary=None, | ^^^^^^^^^^^^ Expected `str`, found `None`
error[invalid-argument-type]: Argument to function `build_plan_stage_body` is incorrect --> tests/commands/pr/test_dispatch.py:398:13 | 398 | summary=None, | ^^^^^^^^^^^^ Expected `str`, found `None` ```
The `build_plan_stage_body` function signature requires `summary: str` (non-optional), but test calls are passing `summary=None`.
